title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Titan Eyeplus Global Group

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Titan Eyeplus Global Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Titan Eyeplus Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About Titan Eyeplus Global Group:
Titan Eyeplus Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Eyeplus Global Group!
